items.name: cognitive-processor
items.description: The cognitive-processor is an adaptive framework for guiding, analyzing, and executing semantic machine learning tasks via intelligent planning and routing.

items.name: pytorch
items.description: APIs and resources for PyTorch, an open source machine learning framework for tensor computation and deep learning developed by Meta.

items.name: amazon-emr
items.description: Amazon EMR is a cloud big data platform for running large-scale distributed data processing jobs, interactive SQL queries, and machine learning applications using open-source analytics frameworks such as Apache Spark, Apache Hive, Apache HBase, Apache Flink, Apache Hudi, and Presto.

items.name: ROCM
items.description: A comprehensive testing suite for validating ROCm (Radeon Open Compute) functionality with Python machine learning frameworks and libraries.

items.name: mlcolvar
items.description: A unified framework for machine learning collective variables for enhanced sampling simulations

items.name: OncoTRAIL
items.description: LLM and machine learning framework for oncology toxicity risk prediction from clinical notes and tabular data.

items.name: pyBIA
items.description: Machine learning-based classification framework for detecting spatially extended and diffuse emission in the high redshift universe, using multi-band broadband imaging.

items.name: Traditional_Chatbot_project
items.description: This project demonstrates the development of a simple traditional rule-based chatbot using Python and Microsoft Bot Framework. The chatbot responds to predefined user commands using conditional logic instead of Large Language Models (LLMs) or machine learning approaches.

items.name: simple-traditional-chatbot
items.description: This project demonstrates the development of a simple traditional rule-based chatbot using Python and Microsoft Bot Framework.The chatbot responds to predefined user commands using conditional logic instead of Large Language Models (LLMs) or machine learning approaches.

items.name: google-tensorflow
items.description: Google TensorFlow is an open-source machine learning framework providing APIs and tools for building, training, and deploying ML models, including TensorFlow Serving for model inference and TensorFlow Hub for reusable model components.

items.name: ml-growth-forecasting
items.description: Machine learning and econometric framework for economic growth forecasting, including model comparison and policy scenario simulation

items.name: LLM-causal-knowledge-extraction
items.description: LLM Causal Knowledge Extraction System automatically extracts causal scientific knowledge from research papers using LLMs and ontology-guided pipelines. The framework converts unstructured literature into structured JSON and knowledge graphs for scientific reasoning, machine learning, and discovery workflows.

items.name: cleands
items.description: CleanDS is a lightweight Python framework for statistical modeling and machine learning. It supports regression, classification, clustering, shrinkage, ensembles, distributions, and dimension reduction with a unified API, formula notation, and model selection tools.

items.name: Machine-learning-based-Buyer-Segmentation-and-Investment-Profiling-for-Real-Estate-Market-Intelligen
items.description: This study proposes a buyer segmentation framework using clustering techniques to identify distinct categories of property buyers based on demographics, financing patterns, geographic preferences, and investment motivations. K-Means and Hierarchical Clustering were implemented and evaluated using Elbow Method and Silhouette Score.

items.name: AetherFramework
items.description: A comprehensive framework for testing, data analysis, and workflow orchestration integrating machine learning systems and state-aware service logic.

items.name: YOLO-Based-Automated-Video-KYC-and-Anti-Money-Laundering-Fraud-Detection
items.description: A unified compliance framework combining YOLOv8 person detection, Tesseract OCR, and DeepFace biometric verification for automated Video KYC, integrated with an Isolation Forest machine learning model for real-time financial anomaly detection. Built with a FastAPI backend and secure SQLite architecture.

items.name: NorthSeaSR_Estimation
items.description: A comparative framework for sex ratio estimation in North Sea fish using classical statistics, machine learning, and deep learning.

items.name: Obesity_Riskprediction_Counterfactual_Explanations
items.description: An Explainable AI-powered obesity risk prediction framework that combines Machine Learning and Counterfactual Explanations to provide personalized lifestyle recommendations. The project uses Random Forest, XGBoost, SVM, and DiCE-based XAI to predict obesity risk and generate actionable health insights for preventive healthcare.

items.name: student-dropout-prediction-ml
items.description: Interpretable machine learning framework for early student dropout prediction using engagement analytics.

items.name: fair-post-processing
items.description: A modular Python framework for fairness-aware post-processing in machine learning.  The library takes classifier probabilities and learns optimal decision thresholds  by optimizing multiple fairness and performance metrics, enabling multi-objective  selection via methods such as TOPSIS and Zenith.

items.name: PocketTorch
items.description: PocketTorch is a small educational C++ machine learning framework.

items.name: rural-financial-access-scotland
items.description: Description: Geospatial analytics and machine learning framework for rural financial access analysis in Scotland.

items.name: Electric-Vehicles-Threat-Analysis-LLM-based-tool-EVTA-LLM-
items.description: EVTA-LLM is a deployment-oriented EV traffic analysis and threat-detection feature extraction framework designed for both offline and real-time live monitoring. The framework converts raw EV network traffic into enriched, analyst-friendly flow features suitable for cybersecurity research, operational monitoring, and machine learning pipelines.

items.name: LayerWise-QC
items.description: A prototype framework for in-situ quality control in laser powder bed fusion, combining optical tomography, powder-bed imaging, process parameters, and multimodal machine learning to estimate layer-wise defect risk.

items.name: tradingsystem
items.description: Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.

items.name: Flight-Ticket-Recommendation-System
items.description: A Machine Learning based Flight Ticket Recommendation System built using Django, Django REST Framework, Pandas, and Scikit-learn.

items.name: EEG-Digital-Twin
items.description: Cloud-Based EEG Digital Twin Framework for Real-Time Mental Health Monitoring Using Machine Learning

items.name: QuChaTeR
items.description: The official implementation and source code of "QuChaTeR: A Hybrid Quantum-Chaotic Temporal Framework for Earthquake Prediction", which has been accepted for presentation at the IEEE ICASSP 2026 conference at the Satellite Workshop on Quantum Machine Learning in Signal Processing and Artificial Intelligence.

items.name: ml4js
items.description: A machine learning framework for node.js (TypeScript).

items.name: cricket-match-intelligence-framework
items.description: AI-driven cricket match intelligence framework using probabilistic modeling, temporal analytics, machine learning, and dynamic game-state intelligence.

items.name: network-attack-detection-ml
items.description: Explainable AI-based network attack detection framework using Machine Learning, SHAP explainability, and MITRE ATT&CK correlation.

items.name: vehicle-specific-risk-prediction
items.description: A hybrid machine learning framework for vehicle-specific accident risk prediction, combining historical and real-time environmental data to generate intelligent alerts for safer navigation in mountainous and high-risk road conditions.

items.name: Machine-Learning-for-Business-Economics
items.description: Interactive Quarto slides and ML pipelines bridging data science with business strategy and economics. Features hands-on case studies in using Python libraries. Built for students and professionals looking to turn predictive metrics into actionable corporate decision-making frameworks.

items.name: bare-metal-ml
items.description: A machine learning framework built from mathematical foundations, implementing classical ML algorithms from scratch in Python and C++ without the use of high-level ML libraries. All linear algebra operations, probability distributions, and optimization techniques are derived and implemented manually.

items.name: tabular-experiments
items.description: Experiment framework for tabular machine learning with augmentation and multi-model support.

items.name: ModelInstabilityUnderMinorityDataScarcity
items.description: A research-oriented machine learning framework for studying prediction instability under class imbalance, featuring AMBA (Adaptive Minority Boundary Augmentation) for stability-aware minority class augmentation and evaluation.

items.name: leakproof-ml
items.description: Github repository for the leakproof-ml tool. Also, contains as use example the results of the paper: "Leakproof ML: Data Leakage Prevention with a Robust, Interpretable, and Reproducible Machine Learning Framework"

items.name: felipearocha
items.description: Asset Integrity Engineer bridging RBI decision frameworks, data engineering, and applied machine learning through transparent automation.

items.name: Punjab-Stubble-Burning-
items.description: A machine learning framework that forecasts weekly stubble-burning activity across Punjab one week ahead, at 7km grid resolution. Integrates satellite, climate, and policy data. PR-AUC 0.869 on held-out 2023 test set.

items.name: Gait-Analysis
items.description: An angle calculator that is based on google's open source machine learning framework "mediapipe" that takes in a footage of a person walking and calculates different types of angles at each frame throughout the video. This is necessary for physicians to diagnose certain locomative related diseases.

items.name: MAFIS
items.description: Development a Multi-Agent System for Automated Machine Learning Pipeline Construction Using AutoML Frameworks

items.name: temporal-strength-performance-prediction
items.description: Machine learning framework for temporal prediction of strength performance progression from athlete competition histories.

items.name: enterprise-supply-chain-analytics
items.description: An end-to-end data pipeline and machine learning model built in Python to predict supply chain delays, mapped to a financial risk framework and a dual-perspective Power BI executive dashboard.

items.name: phishing-url-detection-msc
items.description: Machine learning framework for phishing URL detection using lexical and behavioral features extracted from URL metadata.

items.name: web-app-log-anomaly-detection
items.description: An unsupervised machine learning framework for web application anomaly detection using an ensemble of Isolation Forest, One-Class SVM, Deep Autoencoders, and LOF trained on parsed Apache access logs.

items.name: PUREML-Machine-Learning-Toolkit-from-Scratch
items.description: PUREML is a custom machine learning library built entirely from scratch in Python. It focuses on implementing core machine learning algorithms and mathematical concepts without relying on external ML frameworks such as scikit-learn or TensorFlow.

Developed under the Unified Mentor framework using a statistically realistic synthetic educational dataset.

items.name: Decoding-Attrition-A-Data-Driven-Revenue-Risk-Customer-Retention-Intelligence-Framework
items.description: This project delivers a complete, end-to-end churn intelligence system from raw CSV files to an interactive Power BI dashboard and a machine learning prediction model, using a SQL first, analytics engineering approach.

items.description: Hybrid Rule-Based, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning framework for detecting financial fraud in transaction streams. This project combines intelligent rule engines, ML algorithms, and deep learning models to identify suspicious activities, improve fraud detection accuracy, and support real-time transaction monitoring.

items.description: Federated Multivital Monitoring System > A privacy-preserving machine learning framework for real-time health monitoring. This system uses Federated Learning (Flower/Custom) to train models on vital sign data (ECG, Heart Rate, Arrhythmia) without ever moving sensitive patient data from local devices.

items.description: This research aims to develop and compare multiple time-series machine learning models to predict future donation trends for community food assistance programs. The core contribution is an anomaly-aware, multivariate forecasting framework that not only predicts donation volume but specifically identifies upcoming donation drought periods
